topic: European news on political social media controversies and censorship (May 7-14, 2026)
editorial_overview: No relevant articles were found in the search results from established European news outlets covering the specified topics in the last week. This absence of reported incidents suggests a relatively quiet period regarding politicians' social media deletions, controversial statements, government-pressured content removals, censorship of digital speech, or platform moderation disputes involving political figures. Monitoring continues for any emerging developments.
